headline: Why The Medtronic (MDT) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Diverge
summary: Medtronic’s modeled fair value price target has been adjusted slightly, from US$111.77 to US$111.69, indicating only a very small change in what analysts view as reasonable long term upside. That minor move aligns with a broader split in analyst opinions. Some recent target increases toward US$125 contrast with more cautious revisions closer to US$100 as they interpret the same quarter and outlook differently. As you read on, you will see how these differing perspectives shape the evolving...
